title: T-135 — PARITY: NPD Dashboard Playwright + axe parity (vs fa-screens.jsx:32-174) NPD-e slice of T-052
prompt:
# T-135 — Dashboard parity check

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §11.1, §11.7 + `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (NpdDashboard)
Parent root: T-052

## Goal
Playwright screenshot parity + axe-violations check for the assembled NPD Dashboard page against the NpdDashboard prototype region. Validates layout, all regions mount, and 0 critical/serious axe violations.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/npd/dashboard-parity.spec.ts: seeds dashboard summary + recent-projects fixture; visits /(npd) — captures full-page screenshot.
2. Screenshot compared against the prototype snapshot region with the prototype-parity tolerance configured in repo Playwright config.
3. axe-core run after mount; assert 0 critical and 0 serious violations.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/npd/dashboard-parity.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/npd/fixtures/dashboard-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the /(npd) dashboard route renders, when Playwright captures a full-page screenshot, then it matches the fa-screens.jsx:32-174 prototype region within the configured parity tolerance per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`
2. Given the dashboard page is mounted, when axe-core runs, then 0 critical and 0 serious violations are reported per the parity policy
3. Given the seeded fixture is loaded, when the page renders, then DashboardCounters + DashboardPipelinePreview regions both appear in the expected layout order

## Test strategy
- RED: dashboard-parity.spec.ts before T-134 wiring closes; ensures wiring keeps the dashboard in parity
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e dashboard-parity'

## Risk red lines
- Do not run against shared/staging DB — use isolated test container
- Do not relax tolerance to make tests pass
- Do not skip axe checks
